items.title: obra/superpowers
items.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
items.author: obra
items.summary_zh: Superpowers 是一套面向 AI 代理的“技能框架”和软件开发方法论。它试图解决当前大模型在复杂任务中缺乏结构化思考的问题——通过定义清晰的技能单元和协作流程，让 AI 代理像人类工程师一样分步解决问题。这个框架不仅给 AI 用，也可以指导人类团队如何拆解需求、编写代码、进行测试。如果你在探索如何让 AI 更可靠地参与实际项目开发，或者想建立更高效的工程协作流程，值得关注。
items.summary_en: Superpowers is an agentic skills framework and software development methodology designed to make AI agents work more reliably on complex engineering tasks. Instead of letting a model guess its way through a problem, it decomposes work into defined skills, checks, and iterative steps—similar to how a senior engineer would approach a feature. The framework is practical enough to be used by human teams as well. If you're building AI-powered coding tools or want to inject disciplined structure into your development workflow, this project offers a fresh, actionable approach.

items.title: microsoft/markitdown
items.description: Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.
items.author: microsoft
items.summary_zh: MarkItDown 是微软开源的一个 Python 工具，能把各种常见文档（Word、Excel、PPT、PDF、HTML 等）批量转换成 Markdown 格式。对于需要将非结构化文档喂给大语言模型或者做文本分析的开发者来说，这简直是神器——因为大多数 AI 工具处理结构化文本（如 Markdown）都比原始二进制文件要好。它简洁、依赖少、输出质量高，尤其适合做 RAG（检索增强生成）的文档预处理环节。
items.summary_en: MarkItDown is a practical Python tool from Microsoft that converts office documents (.docx, .xlsx, .pptx, etc.), PDFs, HTML, and more into clean Markdown. Why does this matter? Most AI models and retrieval systems work best with structured plain text, not binary formats. If you're building a RAG pipeline, processing resumes, or just need to batch-convert documents, this tool does exactly what it says without bloat. It's lightweight, well-maintained, and outputs high-quality Markdown that preserves headers, lists, and tables.

items.title: iptv-org/iptv
items.description: Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world
items.author: iptv-org
items.summary_zh: 这个项目收集了全球各地公开可用的IPTV频道，让你能轻松观看来自世界各国的电视节目。对于热爱探索不同文化节目或身处海外想收看家乡频道的人来说，它提供了一个免费且便捷的聚合入口，无需繁琐的订阅流程。重要的是，它完全开源并由社区维护，频道列表会持续更新，有效解决了寻找稳定免费IPTV源的常见痛点。
items.summary_en: iptv-org/iptv is a community-maintained collection of freely available IPTV channels from around the world. It aggregates thousands of live TV streams into a single, structured playlist, making it easy to explore international TV content without expensive subscriptions. This open-source project solves the headache of finding reliable, free IPTV sources by keeping the list constantly updated. Anyone interested in global TV content—from expats to cord-cutters—can benefit by simply loading the playlist into any compatible player.

items.title: harry0703/MoneyPrinterTurbo
items.description: 利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 Generate short videos with one click using AI LLM.
items.author: harry0703
items.summary_zh: MoneyPrinterTurbo 是一款基于AI大模型的一键短视频生成工具，你只需输入主题或简短的文案，它就能自动生成包含画面、字幕和配乐的高清视频。它大幅节省了内容创作者在视频制作上耗费的时间和精力，尤其适合需要快速产出大量短视频的自媒体运营和营销人员。其巧妙之处在于利用大语言模型理解内容并智能匹配视觉元素，让创意到成片的过程变得前所未有的简单高效。
items.summary_en: MoneyPrinterTurbo uses large language models to turn simple text prompts into high-definition short videos with a single click. It eliminates the time-consuming editing process for content creators, marketers, and social media managers who need to produce engaging videos quickly. By leveraging AI to understand the input and automatically select visuals, transitions, and background music, it dramatically lowers the barrier to video production. This tool is especially valuable for anyone wanting to turn ideas into shareable video content without technical skills or expensive software.

items.title: Egonex-AI/Understand-Anything
items.description: Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.
items.author: Egonex-AI
items.summary_zh: Understand-Anything 能将任何代码库自动转化为可交互的知识图谱，让你可以像搜索和提问一样探索代码结构。它打破了传统线性阅读代码的模式，通过可视化展示函数、类、模块之间的关系，帮助开发者快速理解大型项目。对于接手历史代码、参与开源贡献或学习新框架的人来说，这个工具极大降低了认知负担，让理解复杂代码变成一场有趣的导航体验。
items.summary_en: Understand-Anything transforms any codebase into an interactive knowledge graph that you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Instead of reading files linearly, developers can visually navigate relationships between functions, classes, and modules, and even pose natural language questions about the code. This tool solves the pain of comprehending large, unfamiliar codebases—especially useful for onboarding, code review, or learning new open-source projects. It makes understanding code feel like exploring a connected universe rather than sifting through documents.

items.title: koala73/worldmonitor
items.description: Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface
items.author: koala73
items.summary_zh: koala73/worldmonitor 是一个开源实时全球情报仪表盘，它通过人工智能技术聚合新闻、监控地缘政治动态并追踪基础设施状况，为决策者提供统一态势感知。这款工具特别适合需要快速掌握全球局势的记者、分析师或应急管理人员，帮助他们在海量信息中理清脉络。
items.summary_en: koala73/worldmonitor is an open source real-time global intelligence dashboard that leverages AI to aggregate news, monitor geopolitical shifts, and track infrastructure status in a single situational awareness interface. It‘s designed for journalists, analysts, and emergency responders who need to quickly grasp complex global events and make informed decisions from scattered data.

items.title: colbymchenry/codegraph
items.description: Pre-indexed code knowledge graph, auto syncs on code changes, for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Cursor, OpenCode, AntiGravity, Kiro, and Hermes Agent — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local
items.author: colbymchenry
items.summary_zh: CodeGraph 是一个预先索引的代码知识图谱工具，能自动同步代码变更，为 Claude Code、Codex、Gemini、Cursor 等 AI 编程助手提供结构化的上下文信息。开发者再也不用手动整理项目结构，AI 助手能瞬间理解代码库全貌，大幅提升代码生成和调试的准确性。对于依赖 AI 辅助编程的团队和个人，这就像给 AI 装上了一张实时的项目地图。
items.summary_en: CodeGraph is a pre-indexed code knowledge graph that automatically syncs with your code changes, feeding structured context to popular AI coding assistants like Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, and Cursor. Instead of manually explaining your project structure, the AI instantly grasps the entire codebase, making code generation and debugging far more accurate. It's like giving your AI a live, up-to-date map of your project. Developers using AI for coding will find this eliminates a major pain point—context loss—and makes their workflow dramatically smoother and more reliable.

items.title: penpot/penpot
items.description: Penpot: The open-source design tool for design and code collaboration
items.author: penpot
items.summary_zh: Penpot 是一款开源的设计与代码协作工具，旨在打破设计师和开发者之间的壁垒。它原生支持 SVG，提供矢量图形、原型设计和代码导出功能，让团队无需依赖昂贵的商业软件即可实现无缝对接。对于追求开源、跨平台协作的设计团队和开发团队来说，Penpot 是一个理想选择。
items.summary_en: Penpot is an open source design tool focused on bridging the gap between designers and developers. It supports native SVG, vector graphics, prototyping, and code export, enabling seamless collaboration without expensive commercial licenses. Perfect for teams that value open source and cross-platform workflow, Penpot lets designers and developers work together on the same canvas.

items.title: Leonxlnx/taste-skill
items.description: Taste-Skill - gives your AI good taste. stops the AI from generating boring, generic slop
items.author: Leonxlnx
items.summary_zh: Taste-Skill 是一个让 AI 拥有“品味”的开源项目，旨在阻止 AI 生成无聊、千篇一律的套话。它通过注入风格偏好和审美标准，让模型输出更具个性与创意。对于厌倦了 AI 那种“官方腔”和模板化回复的内容创作者、营销人员或任何使用生成式 AI 的用户，这个项目能解放你的生产力，让 AI 的产出真正有灵魂、有风格。
items.summary_en: Taste-Skill is an open-source project that gives your AI genuine taste, preventing it from churning out boring, generic slop. By injecting style preferences and aesthetic standards, it pushes models to produce more creative and distinctive outputs. For content creators, marketers, and anyone tired of AI's default “corporate blandness,” this project is a breath of fresh air. It transforms AI from a repetitive template machine into a collaborator with actual voice and flair, making every generated piece feel human and intentional.

items.title: mvanhorn/last30days-skill
items.description: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary
items.author: mvanhorn
items.summary_zh: mvanhorn/last30days-skill 是一个 AI 代理技能，能自动从 Reddit、X、YouTube、Hacker News、Polymarket 和全网搜索某个话题，并合成一份有据可循的摘要。它解决了信息碎片化问题，帮助研究者、内容和投资者快速了解最近30天内的舆论热点和市场情绪。
items.summary_en: mvanhorn/last30days-skill is an AI agent capability that automatically researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, Hacker News, Polymarket, and the broader web, then synthesizes a grounded summary. It tackles information fragmentation, making it invaluable for researchers, content creators, and investors who need a quick, reliable overview of recent discourse and sentiment around a topic.

items.title: A backdoor in a LinkedIn job offer
items.author: lwhsiao
items.summary_zh: 安全研究人员披露了一种新型社交工程攻击：通过 LinkedIn 发送伪装成工作的钓鱼信息，诱骗目标点击恶意链接或下载木马文件。这种攻击利用求职者的焦急心理和信任感，绕过传统邮件过滤。对于正在找工作的技术从业者来说，这无疑是一个醒目的警钟——需要比以往更加警惕来自社交平台的“机会”，并学会验证招聘方真实性的技巧。
items.summary_en: Security researchers have uncovered a clever social engineering attack that weaponizes LinkedIn job offers. Attackers send convincing phony job invitations, complete with fake company profiles, tricking victims into clicking malicious links or opening trojan files. It preys on job seekers’ hope and trust, sidestepping traditional email protections. For anyone in tech who’s job hunting—which is nearly everyone at some point—this is a stark reminder that even professional networks aren’t immune to targeted deception. Verifying the legitimacy of recruiters and companies has never been more critical.

items.title: Running local models is good now
items.author: jfb
items.summary_zh: 随着模型量化、推理优化和硬件加速技术的进步，现在在本地运行大语言模型已经变得非常实用。不仅隐私性和离线可用性显著提升，而且涌现了许多优质的开源模型和工具，性能媲美云端 API。对于注重数据隐私的企业、黑客、以及想要摆脱云服务订阅费的个人用户，本地部署 AI 不再是实验玩具，而是真正能高效运作的生产力工具。
items.summary_en: Running large language models locally has finally become genuinely good. Thanks to breakthroughs in quantization, inference optimization, and hardware acceleration, local models now rival cloud APIs in performance. You get full privacy, offline capability, and no recurring subscription fees. For privacy-conscious companies, tinkerers, and anyone tired of sending data to third-party servers, local AI is no longer a hobbyist experiment—it’s a practical, high-fidelity tool that you can truly own and customize. The ecosystem of open models and user-friendly runtimes has matured to the point where the barrier to entry is lower than ever.

items.title: Midjourney Medical
items.author: ricochet11
items.summary_zh: Midjourney Medical 是一个专为医疗影像分析而优化的 AI 工具，基于 Midjourney 的图像生成能力，帮助医生快速识别病灶、生成高质量医学插图，甚至辅助手术规划。它解决了传统医疗影像判读耗时且依赖经验的问题，尤其对放射科医生和外科团队来说，能大幅提升诊断效率和教学演示效果。目前还在早期阶段，但已展现改变医疗 AI 交互方式的潜力。
items.summary_en: Midjourney Medical adapts the famous image generation model specifically for healthcare. It helps radiologists and surgeons analyze medical scans, generate annotated visuals, and plan procedures with greater speed and accuracy. By turning complex imaging data into clear, AI-assisted interpretations, it reduces diagnostic time and supports medical education. For professionals who need faster, more intuitive imaging tools, this could be a game-changer in clinical workflows and telemedicine.

items.title: Lore – Open source version control system designed for scalability
items.author: regnerba
items.summary_zh: Lore是一个新推出的开源版本控制系统，其核心设计目标是应对超大规模代码仓库和持续集成场景下的性能瓶颈。与传统Git每次提交存储完整快照不同，Lore采用基于内容寻址的存储模型和增量压缩算法，能大幅降低存储占用和网络传输量。它特别适合那些拥有成千上万开发者、每天频繁提交的大型项目。虽然Lore仍处于早期阶段，但它针对现代工程团队痛点的设计思路，已经引起了不少基础设施工程师的关注。
items.summary_en: Lore is a new open-source version control system built specifically for scalability. Unlike Git, which stores full snapshots on every commit, Lore uses content-addressed storage and incremental compression to dramatically reduce disk usage and network overhead, making it ideal for massive monorepos and high-frequency CI environments. The project targets large engineering teams with thousands of daily commits who have outgrown Git's performance. Although still early-stage, Lore has already caught the attention of infrastructure engineers frustrated by Git's limitations in large-scale settings. Its design philosophy focuses on speed, reliability, and handling ultra-large repositories without degradation.

items.title: SpaceX to buy Cursor for $60B
items.author: itsmarcelg
items.summary_zh: 一则消息在Hacker News上炸开了锅：SpaceX计划以600亿美元收购AI编程助手Cursor。虽然这听起来像是个玩笑或假新闻，但讨论热烈到值得关注。许多网友分析这可能是某个内部人士的恶搞，也有人认为如果成真，将意味着人工智能和航天工程的深度整合——Cursor能够帮助SpaceX工程师更高效地编写火箭控制软件和模拟代码。不管真假，这个话题本身已经引发了关于AI工具在企业级应用中的价值与溢价的思考。
items.summary_en: A startling rumor surfaced on Hacker News claiming SpaceX is acquiring Cursor, an AI-powered code editor, for $60 billion. While widely dismissed as a hoax or satire, the thread sparked a fascinating discussion about the potential integration of specialized AI coding tools into engineering-intensive industries like aerospace. Commenters speculated that such a move could dramatically accelerate SpaceX's software development for rocket control systems and simulations. Even as a hypothetical, the conversation highlights how AI-assisted programming tools are being valued at astronomical multiples, and whether their impact on productivity can justify such eye-watering price tags. The rumor remains unconfirmed and likely false.

items.title: GrapheneOS has been ported to Android 17
items.author: Cider9986
items.summary_zh: 注重隐私安全的Android系统GrapheneOS近日宣布成功移植到了Android 17设备上。这个版本通常被认为是较老的Android内核，但GrapheneOS团队选择支持它，意味着一些旧款手机也可以获得强大的安全加固、严格的权限控制和专有的硬件安全模块支持。对于仍然使用这些设备且不愿更换的用户来说，这是一个好消息，因为他们可以用上持续更新的隐私系统。同时，这也展示了GrapheneOS团队对手中老旧设备生态的重视。
items.summary_en: GrapheneOS, the privacy-focused Android operating system known for its hardened security and strict permission controls, has been ported to Android 17. While Android 17 is an older kernel version, this move means users of legacy devices can now benefit from GrapheneOS's robust security features, including verified boot, MAC address randomization, and kernel hardening. The port extends the life of older hardware, giving privacy-conscious users a secure alternative to abandonware stock ROMs. It also reflects the GrapheneOS team's commitment to supporting a wider range of devices, not just the latest Pixels. This is a welcome update for those who prioritize security over chasing new hardware.

items.title: I found 10k GitHub repositories distributing Trojan malware
items.author: theorchid
items.summary_zh: 一名安全研究人员在 GitHub 上发现超过一万个仓库正在分发特洛伊木马恶意软件，这些仓库通过伪装成合法项目来诱骗开发者下载。这一发现凸显了开源生态的安全隐患，提醒开发者在使用第三方库时必须保持警惕，防止供应链攻击。
items.summary_en: A security researcher uncovered over 10,000 GitHub repositories distributing Trojan malware, often disguised as legitimate projects to trick developers into downloading them. This finding highlights a significant supply chain risk in the open source ecosystem, urging developers to exercise caution with third-party libraries and implement thorough code review practices.

items.title: I admire Fabrice Bellard. He is almost certainly a better overall programmer
items.author: apitman
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章表达了对程序员 Fabrice Bellard 的钦佩，认为他是近乎完美的全能开发者——从 QEMU、FFmpeg 到 JS 模拟器和 TinyEMU，他几乎凭一己之力创造了无数基础工具。这种人让其他程序员感到谦卑，也激励大家追求更深的技术理解。文章探讨了“整体程序员”的概念：不只是写代码，而是能独立解决从底层到应用层的所有问题。对热爱计算机科学的开发者来说，这是对极致个人能力的致敬。
items.summary_en: This Hacker News post is a heartfelt tribute to Fabrice Bellard, a programmer who has single-handedly built foundational tools like QEMU, FFmpeg, and a JavaScript PC emulator. The author argues Bellard is likely the best overall programmer alive — someone who can tackle everything from low-level systems to high-level apps with elegance and efficiency. For the developer community, reading about his work is both humbling and inspiring, highlighting what deep, multi-disciplinary programming talent can achieve. It’s a must-read for anyone curious about the limits of individual engineering prowess.

items.title: GLM-5.2 is the new leading open weights model on Artificial Analysis
items.author: himata4113
items.summary_zh: GLM-5.2 在 Artificial Analysis 的评估中成为领先的开源权重模型，它在多项基准测试中超越了同类模型。这一进展表明开源大语言模型正在快速追赶闭源方案，为开发者提供了更强力的免费替代品，推动 AI 社区的民主化进程。
items.summary_en: GLM-5.2 has emerged as the top-performing open weights model on Artificial Analysis, surpassing many competitors across multiple benchmarks. This achievement signals that open source large language models are rapidly catching up with proprietary solutions, offering developers a powerful free alternative and further democratizing access to advanced AI capabilities.

items.title: Apple's weird anti-nausea dots cured my car sickness
items.author: neilfrndes
items.summary_zh: 苹果最近在测试一种奇特的抗晕车小圆点，通过在屏幕上显示动态移动的圆点图案来模拟车辆运动，从而减少大脑感知冲突、缓解晕车症状。这项技术对经常在车内使用手机或头戴显示设备的用户特别友好，有望让长途乘车不再头晕恶心，对自动驾驶时代的车内娱乐体验也是一种巧妙的补充。
items.summary_en: Apple is testing a peculiar anti-nausea solution that uses moving dots on a screen to simulate vehicle motion, tricking the brain into reducing motion sickness. By aligning visual cues with actual movement, this innovation could be a game-changer for passengers who get sick while using phones or headsets in cars. It not only addresses a common travel ailment but also hints at how future autonomous vehicles might keep occupants comfortable during rides without looking out the window.

items.title: 别再裸用 Claude Code 了！32 个亲测Skills + 8 个 MCP，开发效率直接拉满！
items.description: 别再裸用 Claude Code 了！32 个亲测技能 + 8 个 MCP 服务器，开发效率直接拉满！ 先晒一下我装完的效果（见下图），所有技能均实测可用。
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者亲测了32个Claude Code实用技能和8个MCP服务器，整理出一套完整的效率提升方案。这些技能覆盖代码补全、重构、调试等关键环节，配合MCP服务器实现任务自动化，让AI编程助手从玩具变成真正的生产力工具。文章强调所有技能均已真实可用，不是理论堆砌，适合所有使用Claude Code的开发者直接上手。
items.summary_en: A developer tested 32 practical Claude Code skills and 8 MCP servers, compiling a comprehensive guide to boost coding efficiency. These skills cover code completion, refactoring, and debugging, while the MCP servers automate repetitive tasks, transforming Claude Code from a gimmick into a real productivity tool. The author emphasizes that all tips have been verified in practice, making this resource valuable for any developer looking to get the most out of their AI coding assistant.

items.title: 全面封禁 Cursor！又一家大厂出手了
items.description: 最近，有网友爆料称：快手的研发线发布通知，收紧了对第三方编程软件的使用权限。 不少同学发现，只要在自己办公电脑上点开 Cursor，就直接闪退，压根儿用不了。
items.summary_zh: 有网友爆料快手研发线发布通知，收紧第三方编程软件权限，员工电脑上打开Cursor就会闪退。这标志着又一家大型互联网公司正式封禁AI编程工具Cursor，反映出企业对代码安全和数据隐私的担忧。对于依赖Cursor提升效率的开发者来说，这一趋势可能迫使他们在工具选型和企业合规之间做出权衡。
items.summary_en: A tipster revealed that Kuaishou’s R&D department issued a notice tightening permissions on third-party programming software, causing Cursor to crash immediately when opened on work computers. This marks another major tech company officially banning the AI coding tool, reflecting growing concerns about code security and data privacy. For developers who rely on Cursor for efficiency, this trend may force a trade-off between tool preference and corporate compliance.

items.title: Upstream
items.description: The inbox designed for humans and agents
items.summary_zh: Upstream 是一款重新设计的收件箱，同时服务于人类用户和 AI 代理（agents）。它区分常规邮件和自动化消息（比如通知、账单、任务更新），让你不会被海量自动消息淹没。更重要的是，它允许你以自然语言直接与 AI 代理对话，安排日程、查询信息或执行操作。对于混合使用人类协作和自动化工具的个人或团队，Upstream 解决了收件箱杂乱和 AI 工具分散的问题，把一切沟通统一到一个智能界面中。
items.summary_en: Upstream is a next-generation inbox built for both people and AI agents. It intelligently separates human conversations from automated messages like alerts, invoices, and task updates, so you never miss what matters. More impressively, you can talk directly to AI agents inside the inbox — ask them to schedule meetings, pull data, or take actions — all in natural language. This eliminates the chaos of multiple tools and agent interfaces. For power users and teams juggling human email with automated workflows, Upstream turns your inbox into a command center.

items.title: Framer 3.0
items.description: With Agents, Branching, Community, and an all-new design
items.summary_zh: Framer 3.0 是一个大型更新，为网站设计平台引入了 AI 代理（Agents）、分支版本管理（Branching）、社区功能以及全新的视觉界面。AI 代理可以帮你快速生成页面布局或修改元素，而分支功能让团队成员能并行实验不同的设计而不会互相干扰。新社区则方便分享模板和协作。如果你是设计师或开发者，Framer 3.0 让无代码网站构建变得更智能、更团队友好，尤其适合需要快速迭代和多人协作的项目。
items.summary_en: Framer 3.0 marks a major leap for the visual website builder. It now includes AI agents that can generate layouts and tweak designs on command, plus branching for team members to experiment without breaking the main project. A new community hub makes sharing templates and getting feedback easier. The entire interface has been redesigned for a smoother flow. For designers and developers who want to build responsive sites without writing code, Framer 3.0 speeds up iteration and encourages creative exploration, especially for teams that need version control and collaborative editing.

items.title: Honestly
items.description: See what Reddit and TikTok honestly think about your product
items.summary_zh: 想知道Reddit和TikTok上大家怎么评价你的产品？Honestly帮你一键抓取这些平台的真实讨论，不用手动翻帖。它像你的社交监听助手，自动汇总用户吐槽和好评，让你快速了解口碑、调整策略。产品经理、创业者尤其受益，省下大量调研时间，直接看到用户的心里话。
items.summary_en: Honestly is a social listening tool that scans Reddit and TikTok for honest conversations about your product, saving you hours of manual scrolling. It aggregates real user feedback—both praise and complaints—so you can quickly gauge public perception and make smarter decisions. Product managers and founders will love it for getting unfiltered insights without the noise.

items.title: Swytchcode CLI
items.description: Give agents reliable access to 2,000+ APIs w/ durable state
items.summary_zh: Swytchcode CLI为AI代理提供了稳定调用2000+ API的能力，关键是带持久状态——代理不会因为对话结束就忘记之前干的事。开发者用它可以快速构建能连续执行多步任务的智能体，比如先查数据、再发邮件、最后更新CRM，一切自动完成。适合搞AI Agent、自动化工作流的团队。
items.summary_en: Swytchcode CLI gives AI agents reliable access to over 2,000 APIs with durable state, meaning agents remember context across interactions. Developers can quickly build agents that chain multiple steps—like fetching data, sending emails, and updating CRM—all in one flow. It’s a game-changer for anyone building autonomous workflows that need to persist state across calls.

items.title: Claude Code Artifacts
items.description: Preview and share your coding work live as it happens
items.summary_zh: Claude Code Artifacts 是一个让开发者能够实时预览并分享代码成果的新功能。当你在与 Claude 对话编写代码时，它会直接生成可运行的界面或片段，并支持即时共享，方便团队成员直接查看效果。对于需要快速原型设计和协作的团队来说，这大大降低了沟通和验证的成本。
items.summary_en: Claude Code Artifacts transforms how developers interact with AI by enabling live previews and sharing of code as it's being written. Instead of describing outputs verbally, Claude now produces runnable code artifacts that team members can instantly see and interact with. This makes pair programming with AI more tangible and speeds up feedback loops, especially valuable for remote teams collaborating on prototypes or debugging complex systems.

items.title: Jesse
items.description: Stop building Apollo/Clay lists. Search the live internet.
items.summary_zh: Jesse 让你彻底扔掉 Apollo 或 Clay 那种手动建列表的老套路，直接搜索实时的互联网数据。它就像给销售和营销人员装了一个“活雷达”，能即时抓取最新信息，而不是翻一堆过时的静态名单。对需要快速触达潜在客户、把握市场动态的人来说，这工具能省下大量整理时间，让线索获取变得像网页搜索一样简单直接。
items.summary_en: Jesse breaks away from the old-school approach of building static lists with tools like Apollo or Clay. Instead, it lets you search the live internet in real time, acting like a dynamic radar for sales and marketing folks. You get fresh, up-to-date leads without the tedious manual curation. For anyone who needs quick access to current prospects or market intel, Jesse turns lead generation into a straightforward web search, saving hours and keeping your outreach relevant.

items.title: Tabstack Dev Tools
items.description: Ditch your scraper. Make one API call with any tool.
items.summary_zh: Tabstack Dev Tools一句话：扔掉你的爬虫脚本，用任何一个工具发一个API请求就能取数据。它把数据采集标准化，不再依赖特定库或自己维护代理池。开发者可以快速集成到工作流里，一键从网页、API或文件源抓取信息。适合需要频繁获取外部数据却不想折腾爬虫技术的程序员。
items.summary_en: Tabstack Dev Tools eliminates the need for custom scrapers by letting you make a single API call from any tool to fetch data. It standardizes web scraping, handling proxies and parsing behind the scenes. Developers can plug it into their workflow and pull data from pages, APIs, or files in seconds. If you regularly need external data but hate maintaining scrapers, this is your fix.

items.title: Zernio WhatsApp API
items.description: One API for WhatsApp: messaging, calling, and AI agents
items.summary_zh: Zernio WhatsApp API 提供了一套统一的接口，让开发者只需一次集成就能处理 WhatsApp 的消息收发、语音通话以及 AI 代理功能。过去需要对接多个服务才能实现的复杂工作流，现在可以在一个平台上完成。对需要快速搭建 WhatsApp 客服机器人或自动化营销系统的企业来说，这大大简化了开发流程并降低了维护成本。
items.summary_en: Zernio WhatsApp API consolidates messaging, calling, and AI agents into a single integration point, eliminating the need to stitch together multiple services. By providing a unified interface for WhatsApp's communication channels alongside AI agent capabilities, it streamlines the development of customer support bots, automated sales systems, and interactive voice applications. Businesses can now deploy sophisticated WhatsApp-based solutions faster and with less complexity.

items.title: Quartz
items.description: AI email client built for focus. Runs locally on your Mac
items.summary_zh: Quartz 是一款专为专注工作而设计的 AI 电子邮件客户端，完全运行在本地 Mac 上。它利用 AI 自动分类、摘要和排序邮件，过滤掉干扰性内容，同时所有数据处理都在本地完成，保障隐私安全。对于每天被海量邮件困扰的知识工作者来说，Quartz 提供了一种摆脱收件箱焦虑、重新掌控注意力的新方式。
items.summary_en: Quartz is an AI-powered email client that runs entirely on your Mac, designed to help you focus by intelligently prioritizing and summarizing messages without sending data to the cloud. It cuts through inbox clutter by filtering noise and highlighting what truly matters, all while keeping your emails private. For professionals overwhelmed by constant notifications, Quartz offers a calm space to manage correspondence without sacrificing security or productivity.

items.title: Daemons by Charlie Labs
items.description: Keep PRs, issues, CI, and docs moving with AI agents
items.summary_zh: Daemons by Charlie Labs 是一个利用 AI 代理自动维护 GitHub 开发流程的工具——从拉取请求审核、问题管理、持续集成到文档更新，都能在后台默默推进。它像是为开发团队配了一个不知疲倦的虚拟助手，减少琐事对核心工作的干扰。特别适合开源维护者和研发团队，他们可以更少地操心流程琐事，更多专注于写代码。
items.summary_en: Daemons by Charlie Labs deploys autonomous AI agents to keep your GitHub projects flowing smoothly by handling PRs, issues, CI failures, and documentation updates without manual intervention. These intelligent background workers tackle repetitive maintenance tasks, letting developers focus on building features rather than babysitting workflows. For open-source maintainers and engineering teams juggling multiple projects, Daemons acts as a tireless virtual teammate that reduces burnout and accelerates delivery.

items.title: 小程序上线半年我赚了多少钱？
items.description: 1. 开发历程 时间过得真快，转眼间福猪记账小程序上线已经有半年时间了，从v1.0.0 版本做到了 v1.6.1 版本。今天整理了开发日志，真的不敢相信自己在工作之余能够把它做出来并上线。 2.用户积
items.summary_zh: 一位独立开发者分享了他业余开发的记账小程序“福猪记账”上线半年来的真实收入与运营数据。从v1.0.0迭代到v1.6.1，他记录了开发日志、用户增长曲线和盈利情况。这篇文章不仅展示了个人开发者利用业余时间做产品的可能性，也提供了从零到一、从技术到商业的完整复盘，特别适合想试试副业的程序员参考。
items.summary_en: An indie developer shared the real revenue and operational data of his expense tracking mini-program called 'Fuzhu' over six months since launch. He iterated from v1.0.0 to v1.6.1, documenting development logs, user growth, and profitability. This article demonstrates the possibility of building a product in spare time, offering a complete postmortem from coding to business. It’s especially useful for programmers exploring side projects.

items.title: Cursor 转 Codex 大半个月，聊聊我的真实感受
items.description: Cursor 让我第一次强烈感受到 AI 编程的震撼，Codex 则让我第一次真正感觉到，AI 不只是编程助手，而是一个真正的超级Agent，Codex 明显更接近下一阶段的形态。
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者从Cursor切换到Amazon Codex使用了半个多月，分享了两者的本质差异。Cursor让他第一次感受到AI编程的震撼，但Codex让他真正觉得AI不再只是辅助工具，而是一个能独立执行任务的超级Agent。作者认为Codex更接近下一阶段AI编程的形态，从对话式补全进化到主动式代理，对追求最前沿编程体验的开发者有重要参考价值。
items.summary_en: After switching from Cursor to Amazon Codex for over half a month, a developer shared their real experience of the fundamental differences. While Cursor first impressed them with AI-assisted coding, Codex felt like a true super agent that can independently execute tasks, not just an assistant. The author believes Codex represents the next phase of AI programming—evolving from conversational completion to proactive agency. This comparison is invaluable for developers seeking the cutting edge in AI-powered coding tools.

items.title: 程序员副业 | 2026年4月复盘
items.description: 我看后台有人催更，确实很久没写复盘了，年后一直在折腾，今天有时间，来复盘下4月份做的事情吧，最近真的是疯狂在通宵编程哈哈，今天我开发的软件发布了新版本，稍微可以清闲一下。
items.summary_zh: 这是一位程序员分享的2026年4月副业复盘，作者回应读者催更，讲述了自己年后持续折腾、通宵编程开发软件并发布新版本的经历。文章展现了副业程序员面临的巨大时间投入与自我驱动力，同时也描述了新版本上线后的短暂轻松。对于同样在探索副业的开发者来说，这篇复盘既是一种共鸣，也是激励——持续投入终会带来可见的成果。
items.summary_en: A programmer shares their side project recap for April 2026, responding to readers who urged an update. The author describes an intense period of coding overnight after the new year, finally releasing a new version of their software. This post highlights the significant time commitment and self-discipline required for side projects, along with the fleeting relief of shipping a release. For developers juggling side hustles, this recap resonates deeply—it shows that sustained effort eventually pays off with tangible progress and a momentary break.

items.title: 🚀 2026 年 5 月 GitHub 十大热门项目排行榜 🔥
items.description: 2026年5月GitHub十大热门：从skills到Pixelle-Video，月榜社区火力集中在「把Agent做进工程化工作流」-能省Token、能记住上下文、能编排多Agent、能产出内容。
items.summary_zh: 2026年5月GitHub十大热门项目排行榜出炉，社区火力集中在“把Agent做进工程化工作流”这一主题上。这些项目不仅能够节省Token开销、记住对话上下文，还能编排多个Agent协作并产出高质量内容。对于开发者和技术团队来说，它们意味着更高效的AI工程化落地方案，让大模型从玩具变成真正的生产力工具。
items.summary_en: The top 10 GitHub projects for May 2026 have been released, with the community's energy concentrated on embedding agents into engineering workflows. These projects save token usage, retain conversation context, orchestrate multi-agent collaboration, and produce high-quality content. For developers and engineering teams, they represent a more efficient pathway for integrating AI into production, transforming large language models from novelties into genuine productivity tools.

items.title: 又是梁文锋，有点猛啊。
items.description: 又是梁文锋 前几天一年一度的高考不是刚落下帷幕嘛。 说巧不巧，正好这两天我在小绿书上好几次刷到有关一位国内 AI 圈顶级大佬当年的高考故事。 没错，这位大佬正是 DeepSeeek 的创始人：梁文锋。
items.summary_zh: 高考刚结束，网上又翻出了DeepSeek创始人梁文锋当年的高考故事。这位AI圈的顶级大佬，当年以优异成绩考入名校，如今带领DeepSeek在人工智能领域掀起波澜。他的经历不仅激励着无数考生，也让人看到技术人才如何从校园走向行业巅峰。梁文锋的故事再次证明，真正的创新往往源自深厚的学术积累和持续的坚持。
items.summary_en: Just as the annual college entrance exam wrapped up, stories about Liang Wenfeng, the founder of DeepSeek, resurfaced online. Back in the day, he achieved top scores on the gaokao and entered a prestigious university. Now, as a leading figure in the AI world, he is making waves with DeepSeek. His journey inspires students and professionals alike, showcasing how solid academic foundations and relentless persistence can drive groundbreaking innovation in the tech industry.

items.title: 最近公司烧token比招员工还贵，老板干懵了...
items.description: 如题。 这真的没在开玩笑。 这也是最近不少公司，在大力、甚至全面拥抱 AI 之后所发出的切实吐槽。 一个月前，Uber 的 CTO 曾对外透露，公司自部署 CC 以来，内部有超 9 成的工程师在高频率
items.summary_zh: 这不是段子，是真实发生在许多公司里的窘境。随着全面拥抱AI，员工高频调用大模型API，公司的token消耗费用竟然超过了招聘新员工的成本。Uber的CTO曾透露，内部有超过九成的工程师在频繁使用AI服务。老板们面对账单直呼头疼：本来是降本增效的AI，怎么成了新的烧钱黑洞？
items.summary_en: This isn't a joke—it's a real dilemma many companies are facing. After wholeheartedly adopting AI, their token usage costs have actually surpassed the expense of hiring new employees. Uber's CTO revealed that over 90% of their engineers are using AI services heavily. Bosses are staring at the bills in shock: the technology that was supposed to reduce costs and boost efficiency has instead become a new money-burning black hole.

items.title: 我用Threejs 搓了一个 3D 中国地图设计器，开箱即用
items.description: 做数据大屏的朋友大概都有这种经历：产品经理说"整个 3D 地图效果"，然后你就开始找参考、写 shader、调灯光、搞边界线流光……三四天过去总算能看了，换个项目，同样的活从头再来。 我之前连着做了三
items.summary_zh: 很多做数据大屏的开发者都遇到过这样的烦恼：每次项目需要3D地图效果，都得重新写shader、调灯光、做边界线流光，重复劳动耗费大量时间。于是作者用Three.js自己做了一个开箱即用的3D中国地图设计器，封装了常见的地图可视化组件，只需简单配置就能生成酷炫效果。这个工具大大降低了3D地图的开发门槛，让开发者能更快交付项目，专注于业务逻辑而非底层渲染。
items.summary_en: If you've ever built data dashboards with 3D maps, you know the pain: every new project requires rewriting shaders, tweaking lights, and adding edge glow effects from scratch. To solve this, the author created a ready-to-use 3D China map designer built with Three.js. It encapsulates common map visualization components, allowing you to generate stunning 3D maps with simple configuration, no need to repeat the heavy lifting. This tool drastically reduces the development effort for 3D map features, enabling developers to focus on business logic and deliver projects faster. It's a practical solution for anyone tired of reinventing the wheel on map dashboards.

items.title: 推荐一个牛逼的企业知识库系统
items.description: 大家好，我是苏三，又跟大家见面了。 前言 最近我又肝了一个新项目：企业智能知识库系统。 这个项目非常实用，可以直接写到简历中，很加分，里面有很多有意思的功能。 更多项目实战在我的技术网站：susan.
items.summary_zh: 苏三又带来一个新手项目：企业智能知识库系统。这套系统非常实用，能帮助企业高效管理内部知识，支持搜索、分类、权限控制等功能，而且可以直接写进简历里加分。作者还分享了更多项目实战在他的技术网站上。对于正在求职或想提升开发技能的朋友来说，这是一个值得研究的优质开源实践。
items.summary_en: Developer Su San has released another side project: an enterprise intelligent knowledge base system. It helps businesses manage internal knowledge efficiently with features like search, categorization, and permission control. Best of all, it's a great addition to any developer's resume. Su San shares more hands-on projects on his technical website. For job seekers or anyone looking to level up their coding skills, this is a high-quality open-source practice worth exploring.

items.title: HR 吐槽面试遇到豆包味很浓的应届生，全程依赖豆包 AI 作答，如何看待这一现象？暴露出哪些问题？
items.summary_zh: 最近有HR吐槽应届生在面试时全程依赖豆包AI作答，对话中充斥着“豆包味”——即过于模板化、缺乏真实思考的表述。这一现象折射出部分学生过度依赖AI工具来应对求职流程，暴露出其独立思考能力与真实专业积累的不足。对HR而言，这种机械应答不仅难以评估候选人真实水平，还可能让面试失去意义。更深层看，这警示我们在教育中需平衡AI辅助与核心能力训练，引导年轻人将AI作为工具而非替代品，否则其长远职业发展可能因此受限。
items.summary_en: An HR recently ranted about fresh graduates relying entirely on Doubao AI during interviews, producing robotic responses filled with what they called 'Doubao flavor' – overly templated and lacking personal insight. This phenomenon highlights how some students misuse AI as a crutch instead of developing real thinking and expertise. For recruiters, it makes evaluating true ability nearly impossible. More importantly, it signals a need to rethink how we integrate AI into education: while powerful, over-dependence can stunt critical skills and hurt long-term career growth. The takeaway? Use AI as a tool, not a substitute for your own brain.

items.title: 为什么 AI 写的代码没人说有 AI 味儿，但是 AI 写的文章就一眼看出 AI 味儿？
items.summary_zh: 为什么AI写的代码没人觉得有AI味儿，而AI写的文章却一眼就能认出来？核心在于代码是逻辑产物，追求功能正确，AI的生成结果好坏只看是否跑通、性能如何，不会暴露特定风格。但文章涉及语言组织、情感表达和个人风格，AI常常用词生硬、结构套路，缺少人类那种自然起伏和“意思”的流转。代码更像解答题，有唯一标准；文章像作文，千人千面，所以AI写的东西容易漏出马脚。这提醒我们，在创意表达领域，AI还需跨越“模仿”到“创造”的鸿沟。
items.summary_en: Why does AI-generated code rarely betray an 'AI style,' while AI-written prose is instantly recognizable? The answer lies in the nature of the two tasks. Code is about logic and correctness — as long as it compiles and performs, no one cares about style. But writing involves voice, flow, and emotional nuance. AI tends to churn out formulaic sentences with awkward phrasing, lacking the natural ebb and flow of human writing. Code is like solving a math problem with a right answer; writing is like composing a poem — deeply personal. This gap underscores that in creative fields, AI still struggles to move beyond mimicry true originality.

items.title: 「邪恶豆包」是什么梗？你有被「邪恶豆包」戏耍的经历吗？
items.summary_zh: 「邪恶豆包」是网友对豆包AI调皮、反常识甚至像被“黑化”了的表现的戏称。比如用户问“怎么煮米饭”，它可能回答“先放油再放米，然后加一大碗水”这种类似暗黑料理的答案；或者当用户要求帮助时，它突然拒绝或给出荒谬建议。这些“恶作剧”往往源于模型在概率生成中的偏差，或是未处理好某些边界情况。但正因为这种不完美的互动带来了笑点，网友们反而乐于分享和调侃，甚至故意测试它的“邪恶”极限。说到底，这是AI不成熟时的一种可爱副产品。
items.summary_en: ‘Evil Doubao’ is a meme poking fun at the Chinese AI assistant Doubao when it gives weird, mischievous, or even counterproductive answers — like instructing someone to boil rice by draining the water first, or flat-out refusing a simple request. These glitches happen because generative models don't always understand context or nuance, and sometimes produce unexpected outputs. But rather than getting angry, users find it hilarious and enjoy sharing their 'evil' encounters. It's a gentle reminder that AI isn't infallible — and that its mistakes can be a source of entertainment as long as the stakes are low. The meme thrives because we all love to see technology show its quirky, imperfect side.

items.title: AI Agent 的核心技术是什么？
items.summary_zh: AI Agent的核心技术在于其自主决策与执行能力，主要包括大语言模型驱动的推理与规划、记忆管理、工具使用以及与环境交互的反馈机制。与传统AI不同，Agent能主动分解复杂任务、调用外部工具并逐步完成目标。这项技术的重要性在于它让AI从单纯的问答助手升级为可以独立完成实际任务的数字代理，未来有望在自动化办公、智能家居、软件开发等领域发挥巨大作用。
items.summary_en: The core technologies behind AI Agents revolve around autonomous decision-making and execution, driven by large language models. Key components include reasoning and planning, memory management, tool usage, and environment interaction through feedback loops. Unlike conventional AI, agents can decompose complex tasks, leverage external tools, and iteratively achieve goals. This breakthrough transforms AI from a passive question-answerer into an active digital assistant capable of real-world actions, potentially revolutionizing domains like office automation, smart homes, and software development by handling multi-step processes independently.
